description: Detects synchronous method calls in TypeScript/JavaScript (any member expression call). Note: JSON version cannot filter by Sync suffix (no #match? predicate support in executor) and cannot verify async containment. All member expression call_expressions are flagged. Dropped: Sync-suffix filtering, async-function containment check.

flag.message: Member expression call `{{name}}` detected -- verify this is not a blocking call in an async context
